Implementing DevOps with Ihsan (Excellence)

Senior engineers who turn fragile cloud into reliable, automated infrastructure — without hype, with sincerity. We partner with CTOs, VPs, Directors, and CEOs.

AWS SAAWS DevOpsAWS SysOpsCKATerraformGCP ACEAzure Fundamentals
pipeline.yml
on: [push]
jobs:
  build_deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - checkout
      - setup-node
      - run: npm test
      - run: npm run build
      - uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials
      - run: aws deploy create-deployment # blue-green

From chaos to clarity: problems we solve

Problems → Solutions (PLT → SLT).

Problem
Manual, risky deployments
Solution

GitHub Actions / CodePipeline, blue-green / canary, quality gates & automatic rollbacks

Problem
Expensive, idle resources
Solution

Rightsizing, autoscaling, sleep schedules for dev/test, cost dashboards

Problem
Kubernetes complexity & drift
Solution

EKS/GKE baselines, GitOps (ArgoCD), SRE runbooks, clear handover

Problem
No HA/DR strategy
Solution

Multi-AZ patterns, tested backups, incident drills, disaster recovery docs

Services built for CTOs, VPs, Directors, and CEOs

CI/CD Automation

Pipelines as code with GitHub Actions / CodePipeline. Blue-green, canary, rollbacks, and observability hooks.

Kubernetes & Containers

EKS/GKE/AKS with GitOps, autoscaling, secure networking, and SRE runbooks.

Cloud Architecture & IaC

Terraform modules, ALB/NLB, Route 53/Cloudflare, SSL automation, backups & DR.

SRE & Monitoring

SLIs/SLOs, dashboards, alert engineering, incident drills, and postmortems.

Cost Optimization

Right-size, schedule, autoscale. Measurable monthly savings and governance.

Consulting & DR

Architecture reviews, migrations, resilience patterns, and decision logs.
